title: Preview Template Registry Metadata
description: Library metadata for preview templates rendered at autosmartweb.cz/preview/{slug}. Consumed by Spookybro55/autosmartweby CRM template library page (/templates/library).

version.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking changes; consumers must check.

generated_by.description: Free-form provenance note. Either 'manual seed' + plan ref, or future automation marker.

id.description: Stable identifier — should match the template directory name in src/templates/{id}/. Lowercase kebab-case.

name.description: Human-friendly display name shown in CRM library cards.

description.description: 1-3 sentence designer's-note describing what makes this template distinctive (visual, copy framing, target lead profile).

registry_keys.description: Family slugs from registry.ts that route to this template directory. Used by CRM to join LEADS.template_family for usage stats. Multiple keys = aliases (e.g. 'emergency' and 'generic-local' both render emergency-professional).

obors.description: Primary professions this template suits (instalatér, elektrikář, malíř, ...). Flat array. Filter UI = AND across selected chips.

sub_obors.description: Finer-grained profession cuts (emergency, scheduled, specialist, ...). Flat array.

use_cases.description: Lead situation tags (havárie, rekonstrukce, jednorázová instalace, ...). Flat array.

demo_slug.description: Slug for autosmartweb.cz/preview/{slug} canonical demo lead. Null if no canonical demo yet — CRM library renders placeholder thumbnail.

preview_route.description: Marketing-web route base for this template's preview URL. Defaults to 'preview' which respects the lead's _previews.family for template selection. Set to 'preview2' / 'preview3' / etc. when this template needs a parallel route that hardcodes its own template (used so multiple library cards can render the same demo lead under different templates for visual compare). E.g. community-expert sets 'preview2' so its iframe loads /preview2/{slug} which forces CommunityExpert render.

status.description: Lifecycle state. Phase 1 of CRM library: schema reserves the field, UI does not surface filter for it (deferred to Phase 2).

created_at.description: Date the template directory was first scaffolded (YYYY-MM-DD). Null acceptable for legacy entries without git evidence.

polished_at.description: Date of most recent visual / copy polish pass.

variants.description: Forward-compat hook for the variation engine (async-anti-generic-template-system-v1 plan, BACKLOG). Phase 1: empty array. Future: each variant entry describes a section-level remix of the base template.

variant_id.description: Stable identifier within the parent template's variants array.

section_overrides.description: Future shape — placeholder. Section-level remix instructions for the variation engine renderer.

hash_seed_hint.description: Optional deterministic-pseudo-random seed hint for matching this variant to leads.
